privileged_info_summary: This task operates on Synthea synthetic patient data (Massachusetts cohort). The patient referenced is Conchita Hernandes (PID 1, DOB 2006-12-04, female). The NOSH ChartingSystem environment uses two providers: demo_provider (password: Provider1234!) as the sender, and Dr. Emily Brooks (user id=3, username dr_brooks) as the message recipient. The practice is Hillside Family Medicine. The agent must send an internal message with subject 'Lab Result Follow-up' and specific body text referencing CBC results for patient Conchita Hernandes. All data is synthetic (Synthea-generated) and does not represent real patients. The system runs NOSH ChartingSystem 2 via Docker with MariaDB backend.
